suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a narrow-scope follow-up path for ERP packet cleanup features that only need a focused file edit plus targeted validation, so workers do not have to deviate from the standard host-hard-cut procedure for tasks like secret-scanner cleanup.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `portal-split-final-release-gates` found the implementation correct, but the worker handoff explicitly reported deviating from `.factory/skills/portal-hardcut-worker/SKILL.md` because the feature only required a single test-file credential-literal cleanup and targeted verification rather than the usual controller/service/doc hard-cut workflow.
